falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a reversal is imminent.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5500 with a close above 5550
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug, which historically failed to break key resistance levels, proving the current call incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 90-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate a major market shift, falsifying the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating decisive price action against the current verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
